h9c4a4914g7012g4988gbfcdg7cbc3ed8f72c: Remember - stay near the centre of the group, all right? No wandering off.
he9f9607fgbce2g47bega19dg09099db3a9b8: If we get separated or need to break camp fast, remember - find the river and follow it downstream.
hf66c448bg36e4g44ebg9f93gf31956c374ab: If there's fighting, you run and you do not stop. For anything.
